rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees.
Use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings and assignments.
generic_rules: Component type annexes are for input assumptions and output guarantees.
Implementation annexes are for subcomponent-level bindings.
Avoid using subcomponent ports in type-level contracts.
Ensure AGREE expressions reference visible component features.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees must reference valid component ports or variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level assignments in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
